name: @sig-net/midnight-contract
description: The central signet Compact contract on Midnight: the MPC posts signature responses (unauthenticated counted log, verified off-chain) and remote execution responses (Schnorr attestations, verified in-circuit at post time) here; clients poll it. src/index.ts is the curated export surface.
//exports: Local dev consumes raw TS source. `publishConfig.exports` swaps this to the emitted ./dist at publish time.
//files: src/managed is EXCLUDED from the tarball (prover keys are ~273MB); the build copies the shippable parts (contract/, compiler/, zkir/, keys/*.verifier) into dist/managed instead.

scripts.//build: Typecheck (src+tests, noEmit), emit ./dist, then copy the generated managed/ output in — WITHOUT the prover keys (unshippable at ~273MB; consumers pass zkConfigPath to prove). Requires `yarn compile:zk` first: the verifier-key copy fails loudly on skip-zk-only output.
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/managed/keys && cp -R src/managed/contract src/managed/compiler src/managed/zkir dist/managed/ && cp src/managed/keys/*.verifier dist/managed/keys/
